name: Cube Zones VK
description: XR_DXR_display_zones exerciser (ADR-027), native Vulkan handle leg with the ARRAY / single-pass-instanced (SPI) stereo layout: two 3D zones each submit an arraySize=2 swapchain (view 0/1 as array layers, imageArrayIndex per view). Closes the last per-API zones gap for issue #673 (VK).
